headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -106.0)
key_insights: Fears trending up 27% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 172 quotes and an overwhelming 137 at strong intensity, driving the score to 77.7 — people are venting loudly today.
• This frustration level sits in the upper half of the 168-day range (−1.0 to 169.2), and the score has edged up slightly from yesterday's 70.4.
• Optimism has slipped further to −40.1, now approaching the lower end of its historical range, while Fears have recovered modestly from yesterday's deeper low.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
